description: Core framework: protocols, retriever, experiment runner
daytime_comments: Foundation for everything else. Creates src/protocols.py, src/retriever.py, src/experiment.py, moves features.py. Does NOT delete old files — task-002 handles cleanup.
nighttime_comments: Created protocols, retriever, experiment runner, features module, and 15 passing tests.

description: Migrate existing components to pluggable interfaces
daytime_comments: Moves pipeline code into chunkers/, embedders/, strategies/, scorers/ packages. Deletes old src/pipeline/ and src/data/ after migration.

description: Implement remaining strategies, chunkers, and embedders
daytime_comments: MultiQueryRAG, CorrectiveRAG, AdaptiveRAG, FixedSizeChunker, RecursiveChunker, SentenceChunker, HuggingFaceEmbedder.
Heatmaps, comparisons, per-query breakdowns, CSV/Parquet export, merge. Makes the tool useful for actual research.

description: Wire meta-learner and FastAPI to new 4-axis architecture
daytime_comments: Config label becomes chunker__embedder__strategy__model. train.py accepts ExperimentResult. predict.py returns 4 axes. app.py updated.
